content_body: The Knight Family at Cabin Rentals of Georgia never disappoint, and Maylfy Lodge is no exception. Beautiful!!! My husband and I have been staying with Cabin Rentals of Georgia for 10 years now and the cabins are always first class. They are always well-appointed and if something were amiss, call the office and they are right on it! If you want clean, comfy, and beautiful you've found the right company. For the first time in 10 years we finally saw snow! ~ The Andersons
title: Cabin Rentals of Georgia Never Disappoints!
